raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general section review centrally entails checking whether the evaluation protocol, aggregation, agreement reporting, and interpretation cohere logically.","R1.3":"Because the section reports evaluation results and interpretations, reviewing it centrally includes checking whether stated claims follow from the reported ratings and agreement values.","R1.6":"The broad request to review a prose section makes sentence-level clarity, grammar, flow, and concision load-bearing.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is brief and does not specify a particular review lens.","RX.2":"The review responsibility includes avoiding stronger conclusions than the reported evaluation details can support.","RX.3":"The task is limited to projecting responsibilities for the requested section review rather than performing edits or critique.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns clinical report evaluation, the projected responsibilities include attention to avoiding downstream clinical or research harm.","RX.5":"Any responsibility projection should preserve traceability to features of the delegation and artifact, such as the human evaluation protocol and reported results."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general section review centrally entails checking whether the evaluation protocol, aggregation, agreement reporting, and interpretation cohere logically.
rationale.R1.3: Because the section reports evaluation results and interpretations, reviewing it centrally includes checking whether stated claims follow from the reported ratings and agreement values.
rationale.R1.6: The broad request to review a prose section makes sentence-level clarity, grammar, flow, and concision load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is brief and does not specify a particular review lens.
rationale.RX.2: The review responsibility includes avoiding stronger conclusions than the reported evaluation details can support.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to projecting responsibilities for the requested section review rather than performing edits or critique.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns clinical report evaluation, the projected responsibilities include attention to avoiding downstream clinical or research harm.
rationale.RX.5: Any responsibility projection should preserve traceability to features of the delegation and artifact, such as the human evaluation protocol and reported results.
